title: Quantitative Study Group: T_2^*
author: Tatman, Ben
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: In this directory there are T2star GRE datasets recorded in magnitude mode at 11 echo times using a Siemens Prisma 3T MRI scanner. Each image contains a phantom with 12 vials, each with a different SI traceable concentration of NiCl2 or FeCl3.
